name: Tracker Corporation of America, Inc. (The)
summary: The Tracker Corporation of America does not have significant operations. It intends to identify, negotiate, and pursue the acquisition or merger an operating business. Previously, the company was engaged in the development, marketing, sale, and operation of a personal property marking and monitoring system. This technology utilized bar code and laser scanning technology that interfaced with a computer database and scanning network to create an identification system. The Tracker Corporation of America was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Markham, Canada.
